extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ won with a bike throw after ALAPHILIPPE celebrated early and was relegated for dangerous deviation across the sprint line.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ continued sprinting while ALAPHILIPPE celebrated 50m early, winning by bike throw—stamina in final 200m separates monuments
ALAPHILIPPE deviated 2-3 meters across road in sprint causing HIRSCHI foot unclip, revealing rainbow jersey pressure affects decision-making
POGAČAR shifted from victory objective to damage limitation mid-race, suggesting Tour fatigue impacts monument ambition windows

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: First monument win via superior sprint discipline and endurance in final 200m after multi-hour headwind race
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: Premature celebration and dangerous sprint deviation resulted in relegation to 5th, tactical composure lacking under rainbow jersey
rider_signals.HIRSCHI Marc: positive: Third place despite pulling foot out in sprint shows positioning skill, consistent podium threat in monuments
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: neutral: Podium finish but abandoned victory goal mid-race, Tour de France form not translating to monument finishing power
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: negative: DNF after hitting road furniture hard with head impact, early race crash eliminates pre-race favorite
rider_signals.MCCARTHY Jay: neutral: Avoided worst of same crash that ended VAN AVERMAET's race, bike handling under wet conditions critical
